title: Basalt Walker
description: New enchantment allows you to walk on lava.
body:
## <font color=#333399>INTRODUCTION & COTENTS</font>

#### New enchantment - Basalt Walker

- It is an enchantment to boots that creates soft basalt blocks when walking over lava.
- It has a maximum level of II.
- This is a treasure enchantment that can be obtained only from chest loot, fishing, raid drops, or trading for enchanted books.
- Any still lava blocks with air above within a circle radius of 2 + level around the block being moved to transforms into soft basalt. The lava blocks must also be on the same level as the block being moved to in order to become basalt.
- Unlike vanilla enchantment Frost Walker, continuous motion is NOT required for basalt to remain, which means that you will not fall into lava with this enchantment.

#### New block - Soft Basalt

- Rock generated by the enchantment Basalt Walker. 
- Disappear naturally in a few seconds after being generated.
- It cannot be obtained in survival mode.

#### Supported Languages

- Deutsch
- English
- Español
- Français
- 日本語
- 简体中文
- 繁體中文

## <font color=#333399>ADDITIONAL IMFORMATION</font>

Acknowledgement to zeedif for providing Spanish(Español) localisation!

## <font color=#333399>FAQ</font>

Q: Can I sent mod files to others/share it on a forum/include it in a modpack?

A: No problem as long as you follow rules from [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 3.0 Unported](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/3.0/) license.

-

Q: Fabric?

A: Maybe in July 2021. 

-

Q: 1.7.10/1.12.2?

A: No. Never.

-

Q: How to report an issue?

A: Just post a comment to this page.

-

Q: There is grammatical mistakes/odd language uses in the description! Why?

A: English is a second language to me. Use Chinese instead if you come from China. :)
